turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: Thank you for calling Cascade Family Dentistry. This is Aly. How can I help you today?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Hey, I just moved to the Grand Rapids area and I need a new dentist. I'd like to book an appointment.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: We'd love to welcome you. Can I start with your full name and date of birth?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: My name is Finn Leo and my birthday is May 11, 1995.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: And what's the best phone number to reach you?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I have Delta Dental through my employer.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Mostly a cleaning and check-up. I'm also wondering about cosmetic options for my smile.
